scripts.test:api: newman run collection.json -e environment.json -r htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export test-report.html
scripts.test:api:data: npx newman run collection-csv.json -e environment.json -d test_data.csv -r htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export test-report-data.html
scripts.test:api:data:ci: npx newman run collection-csv.json -e environment.json -d test_data.csv --suppress-exit-code
